case_title: GREG WHARTON ET AL VS. PUNEET CHOPRA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WHARTON, GREG WHARTON, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, PUNEET CHOPRA, RATIKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-26-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, RATIKA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS GREG WHARTON & AMY WHARTON AND DEFENDANTS PUNEET CHOPRA & RATIKA CHOPRA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, PUNEET CHOPRA, RATIKA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-26-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, PUNEET
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ONE RINCON HILL ASSOC. C/O BEVERLY WILSON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHARTON, GREG WHARTON, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOPRA, PUNEET CHOPRA, RATIKA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO GREG WHARTON ON 08/12/2016 REATURNED BY USPS LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO AMY WHARTON ON 08/12/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
